name: Los Angeles Federal Credit Union
description_short: Los Angeles Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering banking, lending, and investment services to the LA area since 1936.
description_long:
Los Angeles Federal Credit Union (LAFCU) was established in 1936 and has operated for 90 years as a member-owned credit union serving the Los Angeles area. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, it operates on a not-for-profit cooperative model where members are owners rather than customers of a corporation. The organization emphasizes community reinvestment and member benefits over shareholder profits.

LAFCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts, vehicle loans, real estate/home loans, personal loans, credit cards, home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), share certificates, investment services (annuities, stocks, bonds, retirement planning), and an online payment center for loan management. The credit union provides online and branch-based services, multiple ATM access, and appointment scheduling. Current promotional rates include vehicle loans as low as 3.90% APR, share certificates at 3.90% APY, VISA credit cards from 10.49% APR, and HELOC options at 4.90% APR.

LAFCU distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, offering member-focused services and community involvement. The organization runs community outreach programs, scholarship offerings ($9,000 awards to ten winners), a "Relationship Rewards" points program for discounted services, and maintains educational content through their blog covering topics like auto buying, debt-to-income ratios, and liability insurance. Their 90th anniversary celebration and emphasis on "90 Years Stronger Together" reflects organizational stability and long-term community presence.

As a legitimate credit union with established operations and diverse product offerings, LAFCU serves members seeking traditional banking services with a cooperative structure. However, availability may be limited to those within their membership criteria or geographic service area, and specific eligibility requirements are not detailed on the homepage. The organization functions as a standard financial institution rather than a specialist lender or alternative finance provider. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Checking Account
features: No monthly maintenance fee (with qualifying deposit)

pros: Credit union structure means member ownership and not-for-profit operations, potentially resulting in better rates and lower fees than traditional banks
Competitive vehicle loan rates starting at 3.90% APR with refinancing options to lower existing rates
Diverse product suite including banking, lending, investments, and retirement planning services all in one institution
Community involvement with scholarship programs, community outreach initiatives, and giving-back programs
Long operational history (90 years) suggests stability and established infrastructure
Online payment center available 24/7 for loan payments from external accounts
Relationship Rewards loyalty program offering points for discounted member services
cons: Credit union membership eligibility and geographic service limitations not clearly specified on website
Home loan rates listed as 'Ask Us' rather than displayed rates, suggesting need for direct inquiry
Limited information about account fees, minimum balances, or specific membership requirements
Blog content shows archive going back to 2022 but limited details on current products and policies
No information about insurance products, fraud protection, or member guarantee specifics
best_for: Los Angeles-area residents eligible for credit union membership seeking competitive rates on vehicle and home loans
Members interested in community-focused banking with reinvestment in local programs and scholarships
Consumers looking for integrated banking, lending, and investment services from a single cooperative institution
Individuals seeking lower vehicle loan rates or refinancing existing auto loans to reduce APR
diagnosis: LAFCU is best for Los Angeles-area residents eligible for credit union membership who want traditional banking services from a member-owned cooperative with competitive rates, particularly those refinancing vehicle loans or seeking home financing. The main caveat is that membership eligibility and service area restrictions are not clearly defined on the website, requiring direct contact to confirm access and specific terms.
services: Vehicle loans (new and used) with rates starting at 3.90% APR
Home loans and real estate financing (rates available upon inquiry)
Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOC) at 4.90% APR
VISA credit cards from 10.49% APR with 1% cash back rewards
Share certificates (CDs) including 90th anniversary product at 3.90% APY
Investment services including annuities, stocks, bonds, and retirement planning
Online payment center for 24/7 loan payments
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
